subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath reserved for the service of His Cause and the exaltation of His Word! That which thou hadst written was read [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ادخره الله لخدمه امره و اعلاء کلمته آنچه مرقوم فرموده بودید قرائت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @unity; oneness of humanity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
